user_query: Which cache metrics should I monitor?

retrieved_context.text: Teams should monitor cache hit rate, eviction rate, vector database latency, and retrieval cost.
Cache entries can be scoped by tenant and expired with configurable TTL policies.

llm_answer: You should monitor cache hit rate, eviction rate, vector database latency, and retrieval cost [chunk-2].
reference_answer: Teams should monitor cache hit rate, eviction rate, vector database latency, and retrieval cost.
